## 📋 What Was Implemented

### Changes Summary

| Component | Change | Files |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| **GitHub Repo** | Logo added to README | `README.md` |
| **NuGet Package** | Logo icon configured | `src/SharpDispatch/SharpDispatch.csproj` |
| **NuGet README** | Logo displayed in package | `src/SharpDispatch/NuGet.README.md` |
| **Package Metadata** | URLs and metadata added | `src/SharpDispatch/SharpDispatch.csproj` |

### New Files Created

```
.github/
  ├── BRANDING.md
  ├── LOGO_CHECKLIST.md
  ├── LOGO_QUICK_REFERENCE.md
  └── LOGO_REFERENCE.md

Root/
  ├── LOGO_INTEGRATION.md
  └── LOGO_IMPLEMENTATION_REPORT.md
```

## 🚀 Publishing Workflow

```
1. Verify Implementation
   → Check: .github/LOGO_CHECKLIST.md

2. Build & Test
   → Command: dotnet build -c Release

3. Create Package
   → Command: dotnet pack -c Release

4. Publish to NuGet
   → See: LOGO_INTEGRATION.md (Step 3)

5. Verify on NuGet.org
   → URL: https://www.nuget.org/packages/SharpDispatch/
```

---
